title: Nginx Web Server Configuration
description: Configuration variables for deploying and configuring the Nginx high-performance Web Server and Reverse Proxy.

WWWROOT_NAME.description: The server_name or domain (e.g., example.com) to serve.

WWWROOT_PATH.description: The absolute path to the static document root to serve.

WWWROOT_LISTEN.description: The HTTP port Nginx should listen on (defaults to 80).

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_PORT_SECURE.description: Global secure port to listen on

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

NGINX_LISTEN_PORT_SECURE.description: Secure port for NGINX to listen on

NGINX_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for NGINX to listen on

NGINX_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for NGINX to listen on

NGINX_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for NGINX to listen on

NGINX_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the service (leave empty for Network Service)

NGINX_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the local user account (if applicable)

NGINX_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Windows Service (allows side-by-side installations)
